title: Oracle Signs 10-Year Software Contract With Pentagon Worth Up To $7 Billion - Slashdot
excerpt: Oracle has signed a 10-year Pentagon contract worth up to $7 billion to provide on-premises software, licenses, maintenance, and consulting for branches of the military. CNBC reports: The contract covers the use of Oracle software in on-premises data centers for branches of the military, the U.S. i...
content_html:
Oracle has signed a 10-year Pentagon contract worth up to $7 billion to provide on-premises software, licenses, maintenance, and consulting for branches of the military. CNBC reports: The contract covers the use of Oracle software in on-premises data centers for branches of the military, the U.S. intelligence community and the Coast Guard, according to a statement. The Central Intelligence Agency was Oracle's first customer. A five-year base period for the contract includes perpetual and subscription-based software licenses, maintenance and consulting, according to one description.

Kirsten Davies, the Department of Defense's chief information officer, said in the release that the agency is saving at least $441 million for taxpayers "by fundamentally improving how we procure on-premises Oracle capabilities."

Kirsten Davies, the Department of Defense's chief information officer, said in the release that the agency is saving at least $441 million for taxpayers "by fundamentally improving how we procure on-premises Oracle capabilities."

sentences.zh: 甲骨文已与五角大楼签署了一份价值高达 70 亿美元的 10 年期合同，为军方部门提供本地软件、许可证、维护和咨询服务。

sentences.en: The Central Intelligence Agency was Oracle's first customer.
sentences.zh: 中央情报局是 Oracle 的第一个客户。

sentences.en: Kirsten Davies, the Department of Defense's chief information officer, said in the release that the agency is saving at least $441 million for taxpayers "by fundamentally improving how we procure on-premises Oracle capabilities."
sentences.zh: 国防部首席信息官 Kirsten Davies 在新闻稿中表示，该机构“通过从根本上改善我们采购本地 Oracle 功能的方式”，为纳税人节省了至少 4.41 亿美元。

content_html_zh: 甲骨文已与五角大楼签署了一份价值高达 70 亿美元的 10 年期合同，为军方部门提供本地软件、许可证、维护和咨询服务。 CNBC 报道：根据一份声明，该合同涵盖了在军方、美国情报界和海岸警卫队分支机构的本地数据中心使用 Oracle 软件。 中央情报局是 Oracle 的第一个客户。 据一份描述称，该合同的五年基期包括永久和基于订阅的软件许可、维护和咨询。 国防部首席信息官 Kirsten Davies 在新闻稿中表示，该机构“通过从根本上改善我们采购本地 Oracle 功能的方式”，为纳税人节省了至少 4.41 亿美元。
